description: Statistics about the video such as the number of times the video has been viewed or liked.

viewCount.description: The number of times the video has been viewed.

likeCount.description: The number of users who have indicated that they liked the video.

dislikeCount.description: The number of users who have indicated that they disliked the video.

favoriteCount.description: The number of users who have added the video to their favorites list.

commentCount.description: The number of comments for the video.

title: VideoStatistics
